step_text: Fill a 4oz spoodle with whole beans to the top (leveled)
Grind beans into French Press on “Regular Perk”
Wet the grinds slightly with hot water and let sit for a few seconds (they will expand/grow)
Fill the pot to under the lip of the pot with hot water
*Gently stir the beans
Place lid on top of press (*do not press down)
Serve on a round tray with a TP mug upside down on a saucer with a doily & sugar stick, and creamer of guest choice
Fill small frothing pitcher to the 9 oz line with whole milk (unless otherwise specified)
Before putting steam wand in the milk, turn it on to blow out any water or milk might be in the line
Put frothing thermometer in the pitcher
Put wand just under the surface of the milk and turn dial on all the way
As froth starts to rise slowly pull the pitcher downward always keeping the wand just under the surface of the foam, allowing it to foam to rise more.
Turn steamer off once the thermometer reaches 140⁰ for adult drinks
Brew 2 shots of espresso (6oz), while letting the foam and milk settle
Pour the espresso into a big mug, pour the milk and top with all the foam
Lightly dust the top with cinnamon
Turn the steamer on for a second to blow out any liquid in the wand
Wipe down wand with a clean damp towel
Empty grinds after each brew (to avoid the screen burning)
Fill frothing pitcher to the 11 oz line with whole milk (unless otherwise specified)
Before putting steam wand in the milk, turn it on to blow out any water or milk might be in the line
Put frothing thermometer in pitcher
Place wand in the center or the bottom of the milk in the pitcher & turn steamer on all the way
Brew 2 shots of espresso (6oz)
Turn steamer off once the thermometer reaches 140⁰ for adult drinks
Pour 2 shots of espresso and all the steamed milk into a Big Mug
Turn the steamer on for a second to blow out any liquid in the wand
Wipe down wand with a clean damp towel
Empty grinds after each brew (to avoid to the screen burning)
